001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.ReflectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ClassUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
024
025import java.beans.*;
026import java.util.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
031
032/**
033 * Filter for customizing how POJOs and beans are handled during serialization and parsing.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * Marshalled filters provide fine-grained control over how classes are processed, allowing you to:
037 * <ul>
038 *    <li>Specify which properties to include or exclude (for beans)
039 *    <li>Define read-only and write-only properties
040 *    <li>Control property ordering and naming
041 *    <li>Configure bean dictionaries for polymorphic types
042 *    <li>Intercept property getter and setter calls
043 *    <li>Define interface classes and stop classes for property filtering
044 *    <li>Specify implementation classes for interfaces and abstract classes
045 *    <li>Provide example instances for documentation
046 * </ul>
047 *
048 * <p>
049 * Marshalled filters are created using the {@link Builder} class, which is the programmatic equivalent to the
050 * {@link Marshalled @Marshalled} annotation. Filters can be registered with serializers and parsers to customize
051 * how specific classes are handled.
052 *
053 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
054 * <p class='bjava'>
055 *    <jc>// Define a custom filter for MyBean</jc>
056 *    <jk>public class</jk> MyMarshalledFilter <jk>extends</jk> MarshalledFilter.Builder&lt;MyBean&gt; {
057 *       <jk>public</jk> MyMarshalledFilter() {
058 *          properties(<js>"id,name,email"</js>);  <jc>// Only include these properties</jc>
059 *          excludeProperties(<js>"password"</js>);  <jc>// Exclude sensitive data</jc>
060 *          readOnlyProperties(<js>"id"</js>);  <jc>// ID is read-only</jc>
061 *          unsortedProperties();  <jc>// Opt out of default alphabetical sorting</jc>
062 *       }
063 *    }
064 *
065 *    <jc>// Register the filter with a serializer</jc>
066 *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer
067 *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
068 *       .beanFilters(MyMarshalledFilter.<jk>class</jk>)
069 *       .build();
070 * </p>
071 *
072 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5>
073 * <ul>
074 *    <li class='ja'>{@link Marshalled @Marshalled}
075 *    <li class='jc'>{@link BeanInterceptor}
076 *    <li class='jc'>{@link PropertyNamer}
077 * </ul>
078 */
079@SuppressWarnings({
080   "rawtypes",   // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
081   "java:S1452" // Wildcard required - ClassInfoTyped<?>, ClassMeta<?> for filter metadata
082})
083public class MarshalledFilter implements BeanFilter {
084
085   /**
086    * Builder class.
087    */
088   public static class Builder {
089
090      private ClassInfoTyped<?> beanClass;
091      private String typeName;
092      private String example;
093      private Set<String> properties = set();
094      private Set<String> excludeProperties = set();
095      private Set<String> readOnlyProperties = set();
096      private Set<String> writeOnlyProperties = set();
097      private ClassInfo implClass;
098      private ClassInfo interfaceClass;
099      private ClassInfo stopClass;
100      private boolean unsortedProperties;
101      private boolean fluentSetters;
102      private BeanInstantiator.Builder<PropertyNamer> propertyNamer = BeanInstantiator.of(PropertyNamer.class);
103      private List<ClassInfo> dictionary;
104      private BeanInstantiator.Builder<BeanInterceptor> interceptor = BeanInstantiator.of(BeanInterceptor.class);
105
106      /**
107       * Constructor for bean filters.
108       *
109       * @param beanClass The bean class that this filter applies to.
110       */
111      protected Builder(ClassInfoTyped<?> beanClass) {
112         this.beanClass = beanClass;
113      }
114
115      /**
116       * Applies the information in the specified list of {@link Marshalled @Marshalled} annotations to this filter.
117       *
118       * @param annotations The annotations to apply.
119       * @return This object.
120       */
121      public Builder applyAnnotations(List<Marshalled> annotations) {
122
123         annotations.forEach(x -> {
124            if (ne(x.typeName()))
125               typeName(x.typeName());
126            if (isNotVoid(x.interceptor()))
127               interceptor(x.interceptor());
128            if (isNotVoid(x.implClass()))
129               implClass(x.implClass());
130            if (isNotEmptyArray(x.dictionary()))
131               dictionary(x.dictionary());
132            if (ne(x.example()))
133               example(x.example());
134         });
135         return this;
136      }
137
138      /**
139       * Applies the information in the specified list of {@link BeanType @BeanType} annotations to this filter.
140       *
141       * <p>
142       * Carries the bean-modeling attributes (property lists, ordering, fluent setters, stop class, etc.)
143       * that used to live on {@link Marshalled @Marshalled} before the bean-layer split.
144       *
145       * @param annotations The annotations to apply.
146       * @return This object.
147       */
148      @SuppressWarnings({
149         "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity: filter-apply dispatch is intentionally consolidated for JIT inlining.
150      })
151      public Builder applyBeanTypeAnnotations(List<BeanType> annotations) {
152
153         annotations.forEach(x -> {
154            if (isAnyNotEmpty(x.properties(), x.p()))
155               properties(x.properties(), x.p());
156            if (x.unsorted())
157               unsortedProperties(true);
158            if (x.findFluentSetters())
159               findFluentSetters();
160            if (isAnyNotEmpty(x.excludeProperties(), x.xp()))
161               excludeProperties(x.excludeProperties(), x.xp());
162            if (isAnyNotEmpty(x.readOnlyProperties(), x.ro()))
163               readOnlyProperties(x.readOnlyProperties(), x.ro());
164            if (isAnyNotEmpty(x.writeOnlyProperties(), x.wo()))
165               writeOnlyProperties(x.writeOnlyProperties(), x.wo());
166            if (isNotVoid(x.propertyNamer()))
167               propertyNamer(x.propertyNamer());
168            if (isNotVoid(x.interfaceClass()))
169               interfaceClass(x.interfaceClass());
170            if (isNotVoid(x.stopClass()))
171               stopClass(x.stopClass());
172         });
173         return this;
174      }
175
176      /**
177       * Creates a {@link MarshalledFilter} with settings in this builder class.
178       *
179       * @return A new {@link MarshalledFilter} instance.
180       */
181      public MarshalledFilter build() {
182         return new MarshalledFilter(this);
183      }
184
185      /**
186       * Bean dictionary.
187       *
188       * <p>
189       * Adds to the list of classes that make up the bean dictionary for this bean.
190       *
191       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
192       *    <li class='ja'>{@link Marshalled#dictionary()}
193       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanDictionary(Class...)}
194       * </ul>
195       *
196       * @param values The values to add to this property.
197       * @return This object.
198       */
199      public Builder dictionary(Class<?>...values) {
200         if (dictionary == null)
201            dictionary = list();
202         for (var cc : values)
203            dictionary.add(info(cc));
204         return this;
205      }
206
207      /**
208       * Bean dictionary.
209       *
210       * <p>
211       * Same as the other dictionary method but accepts {@link ClassInfo} objects directly instead of {@link Class} objects.
212       *
213       * @param values The class info objects to add to this property.
214       * @return This object.
215       */
216      public Builder dictionary(ClassInfo...values) {
217         if (dictionary == null)
218            dictionary = list();
219         Collections.addAll(dictionary, values);
220         return this;
221      }
222
223      /**
224       * Example.
225       *
226       * @param value The new value for this property.
227       * @return This object.
228       */
229      public Builder example(String value) {
230         example = value;
231         return this;
232      }
233
234      /**
235       * Bean property excludes.
236       *
237       * <p>
238       * Specifies properties to exclude from the bean class.
239       *
240       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
241       *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanType#excludeProperties()}
242       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanPropertiesExcludes(Class, String)}
243       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanPropertiesExcludes(String, String)}
244       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanPropertiesExcludes(Map)}
245       * </ul>
246       *
247       * @param value
248       *    The new value for this setting.
249       *    <br>Values can contain comma-delimited list of property names.
250       * @return This object.
251       */
252      public Builder excludeProperties(String...value) {
253         excludeProperties = set();
254         for (var v : value)
255            split(v, x -> excludeProperties.add(x));
256         return this;
257      }
258
259      /**
260       * Find fluent setters.
261       *
262       * <p>
263       * When enabled, fluent setters are detected on beans.
264       *
265       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
266       *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanType#findFluentSetters()}
267       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#findFluentSetters()}
268       * </ul>
269       *
270       * @return This object.
271       */
272      public Builder findFluentSetters() {
273         fluentSetters = true;
274         return this;
275      }
276
277      /**
278       * Bean implementation class.
279       *
280       * @param value The new value for this setting.
281       * @return This object.
282       */
283      public Builder implClass(Class<?> value) {
284         implClass = value == null ? null : info(value);
285         return this;
286      }
287
288      /**
289       * Implementation class.
290       *
291       * <p>
292       * Same as the other implClass method but accepts a {@link ClassInfo} object directly instead of a {@link Class} object.
293       *
294       * @param value The new value for this setting.
295       * @return This object.
296       */
297      public Builder implClass(ClassInfo value) {
298         implClass = value;
299         return this;
300      }
301
302      /**
303       * Bean interceptor.
304       *
305       * <p>
306       * The interceptor to use for intercepting and altering getter and setter calls.
307       *
308       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
309       *    <li class='ja'>{@link Marshalled#interceptor()}
310       *    <li class='jc'>{@link BeanInterceptor}
311       * </ul>
312       *
313       * @param value
314       *    The new value for this setting.
315       *    <br>The default value is {@link BeanInterceptor}.
316       * @return This object.
317       */
318      @SuppressWarnings({
319         "unchecked" // Cast is safe: type parameter verified by caller.
320      })
321      public Builder interceptor(Class<?> value) {
322         interceptor.type((Class<? extends BeanInterceptor>) value);
323         return this;
324      }
325
326      /**
327       * Bean interceptor.
328       *
329       * <p>
330       * Same as the other interceptor method but accepts a {@link ClassInfo} object directly instead of a {@link Class} object.
331       *
332       * @param value The new value for this setting.
333       * @return This object.
334       */
335      public Builder interceptor(ClassInfo value) {
336         interceptor.type(value);
337         return this;
338      }
339
340      /**
341       * Bean interface class.
342       *
343       * <p>
344       * Identifies a class to be used as the interface class for this and all subclasses.
345       * When specified, only the list of properties defined on the interface class will be used during serialization.
346       *
347       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
348       *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanType#interfaceClass()}
349       * </ul>
350       *
351       * @param value The new value for this setting.
352       * @return This object.
353       */
354      public Builder interfaceClass(Class<?> value) {
355         interfaceClass = value == null ? null : info(value);
356         return this;
357      }
358
359      /**
360       * Interface class.
361       *
362       * <p>
363       * Same as the other interfaceClass method but accepts a {@link ClassInfo} object directly instead of a {@link Class} object.
364       *
365       * @param value The new value for this setting.
366       * @return This object.
367       */
368      public Builder interfaceClass(ClassInfo value) {
369         interfaceClass = value;
370         return this;
371      }
372
373      /**
374       * Bean property includes.
375       *
376       * <p>
377       * Specifies the set and order of names of properties associated with the bean class.
378       *
379       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
380       *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanType#properties()}
381       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanProperties(Class, String)}
382       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanProperties(String, String)}
383       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanProperties(Map)}
384       * </ul>
385       *
386       * @param value
387       *    The new value for this setting.
388       *    <br>Values can contain comma-delimited list of property names.
389       * @return This object.
390       */
391      public Builder properties(String...value) {
392         properties = set();
393         for (var v : value)
394            split(v, x -> properties.add(x));
395         return this;
396      }
397
398      /**
399       * Bean property namer.
400       *
401       * <p>
402       * The class to use for calculating bean property names.
403       *
404       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
405       *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanType#propertyNamer()}
406       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#propertyNamer(Class)}
407       *    <li class='jc'>{@link PropertyNamer}
408       * </ul>
409       *
410       * @param value
411       *    The new value for this setting.
412       *    <br>The default is {@link BasicPropertyNamer}.
413       * @return This object.
414       */
415      public Builder propertyNamer(Class<? extends PropertyNamer> value) {
416         propertyNamer.type(value);
417         return this;
418      }
419
420      /**
421       * Bean property namer.
422       *
423       * <p>
424       * Same as the other propertyNamer method but accepts a {@link ClassInfoTyped} object directly instead of a {@link Class} object.
425       *
426       * @param value The new value for this setting.
427       * @return This object.
428       */
429      public Builder propertyNamer(ClassInfoTyped<? extends PropertyNamer> value) {
430         propertyNamer.type(value);
431         return this;
432      }
433
434      /**
435       * Read-only bean properties.
436       *
437       * <p>
438       * Specifies one or more properties on a bean that are read-only despite having valid getters.
439       *
440       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
441       *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanType#readOnlyProperties()}
442       *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanProp#ro()}
443       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanPropertiesReadOnly(Class, String)}
444       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanPropertiesReadOnly(String, String)}
445       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanPropertiesReadOnly(Map)}
446       * </ul>
447       *
448       * @param value
449       *    The new value for this setting.
450       *    <br>Values can contain comma-delimited list of property names.
451       * @return This object.
452       */
453      public Builder readOnlyProperties(String...value) {
454         readOnlyProperties = set();
455         for (var v : value)
456            split(v, x -> readOnlyProperties.add(x));
457         return this;
458      }
459
460      /**
461       * Opt out of alphabetical property sorting for this specific bean.
462       *
463       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
464       *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanType#unsorted()}
465       *    <li class='jf'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#unsortedProperties()}
466       * </ul>
467       *
468       * @return This object.
469       */
470      public Builder unsortedProperties() {
471         unsortedProperties = true;
472         return this;
473      }
474
475      /**
476       * Opt out of alphabetical property sorting for this specific bean.
477       *
478       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
479       *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanType#unsorted()}
480       *    <li class='jf'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#unsortedProperties()}
481       * </ul>
482       *
483       * @param value
484       *    The new value for this property.
485       *    <br>The default is <jk>false</jk>.
486       * @return This object.
487       */
488      public Builder unsortedProperties(boolean value) {
489         unsortedProperties = value;
490         return this;
491      }
492
493      /**
494       * Bean stop class.
495       *
496       * <p>
497       * Identifies a stop class for this class and all subclasses.
498       * Identical in purpose to the stop class specified by {@link Introspector#getBeanInfo(Class, Class)}.
499       *
500       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
501       *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanType#stopClass()}
502       * </ul>
503       *
504       * @param value The new value for this setting.
505       * @return This object.
506       */
507      public Builder stopClass(Class<?> value) {
508         stopClass = value == null ? null : info(value);
509         return this;
510      }
511
512      /**
513       * Stop class.
514       *
515       * <p>
516       * Same as the other stopClass method but accepts a {@link ClassInfo} object directly instead of a {@link Class} object.
517       *
518       * @param value The new value for this setting.
519       * @return This object.
520       */
521      public Builder stopClass(ClassInfo value) {
522         stopClass = value;
523         return this;
524      }
525
526      /**
527       * Bean dictionary type name.
528       *
529       * <p>
530       * Specifies the dictionary type name for this bean.
531       *
532       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
533       *    <li class='ja'>{@link Marshalled#typeName()}
534       * </ul>
535       *
536       * @param value The new value for this setting.
537       * @return This object.
538       */
539      public Builder typeName(String value) {
540         typeName = value;
541         return this;
542      }
543
544      /**
545       * Write-only bean properties.
546       *
547       * <p>
548       * Specifies one or more properties on a bean that are write-only despite having valid setters.
549       *
550       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
551       *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanType#writeOnlyProperties()}
552       *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanProp#wo()}
553       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanPropertiesWriteOnly(Class, String)}
554       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanPropertiesWriteOnly(String, String)}
555       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingContext.Builder#beanPropertiesWriteOnly(Map)}
556       * </ul>
557       *
558       * @param value
559       *    The new value for this setting.
560       *    <br>Values can contain comma-delimited list of property names.
561       * @return This object.
562       */
563      public Builder writeOnlyProperties(String...value) {
564         writeOnlyProperties = set();
565         for (var v : value)
566            split(v, x -> writeOnlyProperties.add(x));
567         return this;
568      }
569   }
570
571   /**
572    * Create a new builder for this object for use with bean classes.
573    *
574    * @param <T> The bean class being filtered.
575    * @param beanClass The bean class being filtered.
576    * @return A new builder.
577    */
578   public static <T> Builder create(ClassInfoTyped<T> beanClass) {
579      return new Builder(beanClass);
580   }
581
582   private final ClassInfoTyped<?> beanClass;
583   private final List<ClassInfo> beanDictionary;
584   private final String example;
585   private final Set<String> excludeProperties;
586   private final boolean fluentSetters;
587   private final ClassInfo implClass;
588   private final ClassInfo interfaceClass;
589   private final BeanInterceptor interceptor;
590   private final Set<String> properties;
591   private final PropertyNamer propertyNamer;
592   private final Set<String> readOnlyProperties;
593   private final boolean unsortedProperties;
594   private final ClassInfo stopClass;
595   private final String typeName;
596   private final Set<String> writeOnlyProperties;
597
598   /**
599    * Constructor.
600    *
601    * @param builder The builder for this object.
602    */
603   protected MarshalledFilter(Builder builder) {
604      this.beanClass = builder.beanClass;
605      this.typeName = builder.typeName;
606      this.properties = copyOf(builder.properties);
607      this.excludeProperties = copyOf(builder.excludeProperties);
608      this.readOnlyProperties = copyOf(builder.readOnlyProperties);
609      this.writeOnlyProperties = copyOf(builder.writeOnlyProperties);
610      this.example = builder.example;
611      this.implClass = builder.implClass;
612      this.interfaceClass = builder.interfaceClass;
613      this.stopClass = builder.stopClass;
614      this.unsortedProperties = builder.unsortedProperties;
615      this.fluentSetters = builder.fluentSetters;
616      this.propertyNamer = builder.propertyNamer.asOptional().orElse(null);
617      this.beanDictionary = builder.dictionary == null ? list() : u(copyOf(builder.dictionary));
618      this.interceptor = builder.interceptor.asOptional().orElse(BeanInterceptor.DEFAULT);
619   }
620
621   /**
622    * Returns the bean class that this filter applies to.
623    *
624    * @return The bean class that this filter applies to, or <jk>null</jk> if this is a non-bean filter.
625    */
626   @Override
627   public ClassInfoTyped<?> getBeanClass() { return beanClass; }
628
629   /**
630    * Returns the bean dictionary defined on this bean.
631    *
632    * @return An unmodifiable list of the bean dictionary defined on this bean, or an empty list if no bean dictionary is defined.
633    */
634   @Override
635   public List<ClassInfo> getBeanDictionary() { return beanDictionary; }
636
637   /**
638    * Returns the example associated with this class.
639    *
640    * @return The example associated with this class, or <jk>null</jk> if no example is associated.
641    */
642   @Override
643   public String getExample() { return example; }
644
645   /**
646    * Returns the list of properties to ignore on a bean.
647    *
648    * @return The names of the properties to ignore on a bean, or an empty set to not ignore any properties.
649    */
650   @Override
651   public Set<String> getExcludeProperties() { return excludeProperties; }
652
653   /**
654    * Returns the implementation class associated with this class.
655    *
656    * @return The implementation class associated with this class, or <jk>null</jk> if no implementation class is associated.
657    */
658   @Override
659   public ClassInfo getImplClass() { return implClass; }
660
661   /**
662    * Returns the interface class associated with this class.
663    *
664    * @return The interface class associated with this class, or <jk>null</jk> if no interface class is associated.
665    */
666   @Override
667   public ClassInfo getInterfaceClass() { return interfaceClass; }
668
669   /**
670    * Returns the set and order of names of properties associated with a bean class.
671    *
672    * @return
673    *    The names of the properties associated with a bean class, or and empty set if all bean properties should
674    *    be used.
675    */
676   @Override
677   public Set<String> getProperties() { return properties; }
678
679   /**
680    * Returns the {@link PropertyNamer} associated with the bean to tailor the names of bean properties.
681    *
682    * @return The property namer class, or <jk>null</jk> if no property namer is associated with this bean property.
683    */
684   @Override
685   public PropertyNamer getPropertyNamer() { return propertyNamer; }
686
687   /**
688    * Returns the list of read-only properties on a bean.
689    *
690    * @return The names of the read-only properties on a bean, or an empty set to not have any read-only properties.
691    */
692   @Override
693   public Set<String> getReadOnlyProperties() { return readOnlyProperties; }
694
695   /**
696    * Returns the stop class associated with this class.
697    *
698    * @return The stop class associated with this class, or <jk>null</jk> if no stop class is associated.
699    */
700   @Override
701   public ClassInfo getStopClass() { return stopClass; }
702
703   /**
704    * Returns the dictionary name associated with this bean.
705    *
706    * @return The dictionary name associated with this bean, or <jk>null</jk> if no name is defined.
707    */
708   @Override
709   public String getTypeName() { return typeName; }
710
711   /**
712    * Returns the list of write-only properties on a bean.
713    *
714    * @return The names of the write-only properties on a bean, or an empty set to not have any write-only properties.
715    */
716   @Override
717   public Set<String> getWriteOnlyProperties() { return writeOnlyProperties; }
718
719   /**
720    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if we should find fluent setters.
721    *
722    * @return <jk>true</jk> if fluent setters should be found.
723    */
724   @Override
725   public boolean isFluentSetters() { return fluentSetters; }
726
727   /**
728    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the properties defined on this bean class should be ordered alphabetically.
729    *
730    * <p>
731    * This method is only used when the {@link #getProperties()} method returns <jk>null</jk>.
732    * Otherwise, the ordering of the properties in the returned value is used.
733    *
734    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this bean opts out of alphabetical property sorting.
735    */
736   @Override
737   public boolean isUnsortedProperties() { return unsortedProperties; }
738
739   /**
740    * Calls the {@link BeanInterceptor#readProperty(Object, String, Object)} method on the registered property filters.
741    *
742    * @param bean The bean from which the property was read.
743    * @param name The property name.
744    * @param value The value just extracted from calling the bean getter.
745    * @return The value to serialize.  Default is just to return the existing value.
746    */
747   @SuppressWarnings({
748      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
749   })
750   @Override
751   public Object readProperty(Object bean, String name, Object value) {
752      return interceptor.readProperty(bean, name, value);
753   }
754
755   /**
756    * Calls the {@link BeanInterceptor#writeProperty(Object, String, Object)} method on the registered property filters.
757    *
758    * @param bean The bean from which the property was read.
759    * @param name The property name.
760    * @param value The value just parsed.
761    * @return The value to serialize.  Default is just to return the existing value.
762    */
763   @SuppressWarnings({
764      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
765   })
766   @Override
767   public Object writeProperty(Object bean, String name, Object value) {
768      return interceptor.writeProperty(bean, name, value);
769   }
770}
